/usr/bin/c++    -pthread -Wall -funroll-loops -Wno-ignored-attributes -Wno-unused-result -march=native -maes -mrdseed -std=c++11 -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_test_fss.dir/test_fss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_test_fss.dir/__/mpc_cuda/fss_cuda.cu.o  -o ../bin/test_test_fss   -L/usr/local/cuda-11.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-11.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libemp-tool.so -lssl -lcrypto -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
